title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Oracle India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
